goal: Turn the current held-beta NodeMCPHost outcome into an explicit promotion-readiness checklist with tracked evidence boundaries and deferred risks.
successCriteria: Transport evidence, host evidence, and deferred MCP risks are rendered as separate readiness signals.
NodeMCPHost promotion decisions can cite tracked evidence instead of transcript-only review notes.
Verification report explains why NodeMCPHost is held and what evidence would be required for the next promotion step.
explicitlyOutOfScope: Adding new MCP runtime surface such as notifications, OAuth token acquisition, or multi-server routing.
Promoting NodeMCPHost beyond held beta without updated tracked evidence.
